headlines.title: U.S. Strikes Iran Again as Brent Slips Despite Escalating Conflict
headlines.summary: The oil market is treating another US-Iran escalation as background noise. headlines.title: U.S. Crude Inventories Fall 1.7 Million Barrels As Iran Tensions Rattle Markets
